title: Make Grabowski operator watchdog non-disruptive
goal: Fix the Grabowski operator semantic watchdog so streamable-http MCP probe failures cannot restart or interrupt a healthy live operator session.

acceptance.assertion: The watchdog probe is tested against the current streamable-http MCP behavior and distinguishes transient probe failures from service death.
A healthy active operator is not restarted solely due to intermittent mcp-probe-failed results.
The temporary Heim-PC advisory-only drop-in can be removed after the repo fix is deployed and verified.

metadata.live_audit_finding: operator watchdog caused MCP tool interruption and service restart on 2026-07-08; local drop-in changed it to --check-only.
